demo_timestamps.description: Creating an issue in Autodesk Forma and sending a WhatsApp message from the application
Sending messages to WhatsApp using templates and handling phone number fallbacks

themes: Integration of Autodesk Format with WhatsApp

client_mentions.name: EBS
client_mentions.context: EBS is a construction company specializing in healthcare, schools, and hospitals.

ai_technologies.name: AI agent
ai_technologies.context: Used to create human and personalized WhatsApp messages from issue data

ai_technologies.name: AI agents
ai_technologies.context: Further tuning AI agents for message standards

summary: The video explores an application created by EBS that enhances construction site safety notifications by integrating Autodesk Construction Cloud (ACC) and Autodesk Forma with WhatsApp, enabling real-time, personalized alerts using AI agents. It also addresses challenges in AI tuning, managing phone numbers, and WhatsApp's message template categorization, ensuring accurate communication and feedback loops back into Forma.
